race.description: Queen Of The West Afterparty – Sat 18 April Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: JUST ON FIRE (5) has progressed nicely in his last couple of runs and was rewarded for his consistency with a dominant win over 1700m at Condobolin. Looks up to this from the inside gate. Each way. YORKEL (1) won well over this track and trip two-back, then covered a stack of ground in the run with a fading last over 1400m at Mudgee. Winning apprentice hops back on and can bounce back quickly. BILL PEYTO (9) proven miler who backs up quickly after finishing fourth over 2100m at Tamworth last Monday. Value contender well in with the claim. SAINT PHILOMENA (6) has her hoof on the till after closing late for a respectable second behind Zelestial at this track and trip. Can race a touch closer and take stopping.
